title: Tanacetopsis urgutensis
taxonomy: Tanacetopsis urgutensis is classified within the family Asteraceae. This family comprises various flowering plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. Tanacetopsis urgutensis is further categorized within the tribe Gnaphalieae, which is a group of plants characterized by their small, daisy-like flowers. The species is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is a type of shrubby herb that grows in areas with high altitudes and limited vegetation.
